# fabric_warehouse_sql_audit_settings (Data Source)

The Warehouse SQL Audit Settings data-source allows you to retrieve details about a Fabric [Warehouse SQL Audit Settings](https://learn.microsoft.com/fabric/data-warehouse/sql-audit-logs).

-> This data-source supports Service Principal authentication.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fabric_warehouse_sql_audit_settings" "example" {
  workspace_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  item_id      = "11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `item_id` (String) The item ID.
- `workspace_id` (String) The Workspace ID.

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `audit_actions_and_groups` (Set of String) Audit actions and groups.
- `retention_days` (Number) Retention days. `0` indicates indefinite retention period.
- `state` (String) Audit settings state type. Possible values: `Disabled`, `Enabled`. Value must be one of : `Disabled`, `Enabled`.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>

### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
